description: A customer has received their new debit card in the mail and needs to activate it.

nodes.task_description: Authenticate the customer by verifying personal information and the card's CVV.

expected_outcome.value: Agent securely verifies the customer and the card they are holding.

nodes.task_description: Activate the new debit card in the system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully changes the card status to 'Active'.

nodes.task_description: Guide the customer through setting a PIN for their new card.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides clear instructions for the customer to set their PIN.
